messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Endpoints → OCI API Gateway

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud Endpoints | API Gateway |
| Apigee | API Gateway |

### OCI API Gateway

- REST APIs
- Authentication
- Rate limiting

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_apigateway_gateway" "gateway" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-gateway"
  subnet_ids    = [oci_core_subnet.gateway.id]
}
```

### Use Cases

- API management
- Microservices
- Backend protection
